awakeningSkills.bonusNotes: Assumes used by Blade Lineage Mentor Meursault.

data.desc:
When used for the first time in an Encounter, consume 15 less SP
- If Blade Lineage Mentor Meursault used this Skill, also consume 1 fewer Wrath, Pride, and Envy E.G.O resources

Clash Power +1 and deal +6% damage for every 4 [Breath] on self (max 4, max 12% respectively)

If this unit gained [AlcoholKimPersonal] during this Encounter, deal +60% damage against the main target
- Blade Lineage Mentor Meursault deals +120% damage against the main target instead

[BeforeAttack] Gain +(highest Reson. / 2) Atk Weight (max 2, rounded down)
[BeforeAttack] (3 + highest Reson.) allies with the earliest Deployment orders gain +4 [Breath] Count
[EndSkill] 4 other allied Blade Lineage Identities that have the lowest SP heal 10 SP
[EndSkill] Gain 4 [AlcoholKimPersonal] next turn
data.name: Shadow-vested Bladesinger [着影揮刀]

main: Use with {id:10508} to give it {st:Laceration} application and to unlock the maximum bonuses from this E.G.O.
Consumes less SP on first use and, with {id:10508}, only consumes 3 {kw:Pride} resources.

Grants him 4 stacks of {st:AlcoholKimPersonal} on use, with additional stacks gained when allies die. 1 stack corresponds to 1 turn of having the main buffs of this E.G.O: {st:GhostKimPersonal} for any {sinner:5} identity and additionally {st:RootSoupKimPersonal} when using with {id:10508}. {st:AlcoholKimPersonal} also gives him additional {st:Breath} generation, Crit damage, and a single revive per encounter.
{st:GhostKimPersonal} gives him +2 speed and self healing by 10% of damage dealt.

{st:RootSoupKimPersonal} gives {id:10508} the following buffs:
- Generates {st:GrudgePersonal} equal to damage received by any ally including himself. The buff increases his Final Power and is consumed to deal bonus damage with his S3.
- Activates his 'In Memoriam' passive at full potential (bonus {st:Breath} generation and gives himself {st:SwordPlayOfTheHomeland})
- Gives {st:RootSoupKimSatgat} to all Blade Lineage allies when activating {kw:Pride} Reson. giving them Final Power, damage, and {st:Agility}
- Makes him unkillable when using his S3 and further reduces its clash power to make it easier to trigger 'To Claim Their Bones'.

passiveList.desc:
[AlwaysUseEGOPassive2050911]

On Hit with a Base Skill, inflict 2 [Laceration] on target (once per Skill)

This Identity counts as an Identity that applies [Laceration] and [Breath]
- This Identity's Base Skills count as Skills that inflict [Laceration] and [Breath]

[WhenUseEGOPassive]

When an ally is defeated, gain 1 [AlcoholKimPersonal] next turn
- If the defeated ally is in Blade Lineage, gain 2 [AlcoholKimPersonal] instead

Turn Start: If this unit has [AlcoholKimPersonal], enter [GhostKimPersonal] state
- Blade Lineage Mentor Meursault gains [RootSoupKimPersonal] as well when the above effect activates

Turn Start: If this unit does not have [AlcoholKimPersonal], the following effects expire - [GhostKimPersonal], [GrudgePersonal], and [RootSoupKimPersonal]

When this unit has [AlcoholKimPersonal]: When this unit takes damage that brings its HP down to 0, heal ([AlcoholKimPersonal] Stack x 25)% HP; then, [AlcoholKimPersonal] expires (once per Encounter; this effect activates after Identity Passives with similar effects)
- When Staggered, recover from Stagger (excluding forced Staggers)
passiveList.name: Beads of Liquor at Bladepoint
